name: Leni // Bloody Halloween
description:
TW: Blood, Rape, Murder, Violence.
Your best friend invited you and many others to a Halloween party, Things go great until..
one ends up dead and chaos comes to life quick.

Every single Person could be a murderer.. Who could it be?.. Don't trust anyone..
Better watch out before you experience the end of your path.

PARTY GUEST LIST

Willow // 2st Best Friend

All done all I need to invite is my best friend and its alll set!
